import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./PathologyPage.css"; const PathologyPage = () => { const [selectedCheckup, setSelectedCheckup] = useState(null); const fullBodyCheckups = [ { title: "STD Test Checkup - Essential", price: 1499, oldPrice: 2990, discount: "50% Off", parameters: 4, tests: [ "HBsAg (ECLIA)", "VDRL Qualitative", "Hepatitis C Virus antibodies (Anti HCV)", "1 other test", ], time: "Reports Within 12 hours", }, { title: "STD Test Checkup - Advanced", price: 3999, oldPrice: 9190, discount: "56% Off", parameters: 6, tests: [ "HBsAg (ECLIA)", "VDRL Qualitative", "Hepatitis C Virus antibodies (Anti HCV)", "HIV 1 & 2 Antibodies", "Herpes Simplex Virus (HSV)", "Syphilis TPHA", ], time: "Reports Within 24 hours", }, ]; const handleViewDetails = (item) => { setSelectedCheckup(item); }; const handleClose = () => { setSelectedCheckup(null); }; return (

Popular Health Checkups

handleViewDetails(fullBodyCheckups[0])}>

STD Checkups

handleViewDetails(fullBodyCheckups[1])}>

Fever Checkups

PCOD Checkups

Senior Citizen

Popular Health Tests

Kidney Function Test

Vitamin D, 25-Hydroxy

HbA1c

Lipid Profile

Full Body Checkups

{fullBodyCheckups.map((item, index) => (
handleViewDetails(item)} >

{item.title}

₹{item.oldPrice} ₹{item.price}
{item.discount}
))}
{/* Modal / Popup */} {selectedCheckup && (
e.stopPropagation()}>

{selectedCheckup.title}

{selectedCheckup.discount}
₹{selectedCheckup.oldPrice} ₹{selectedCheckup.price}

{selectedCheckup.parameters} parameters included

Tests included: {selectedCheckup.tests.join(", ")}
{selectedCheckup.time}
)}
); }; export default PathologyPage;
